'''zazhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qinqin|qinqin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qinqin|qinqin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zazhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzhingith|zæzhingith]] || [[word:zæzhingij|zæzhingij]] || [[word:zæzhingish|zæzhingish]] || [[word:zæzhingi|zæzhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhuzhunguth|zazhuzhunguth]] || [[word:zazhuzhunguj|zazhuzhunguj]] || [[word:zazhuzhungush|zazhuzhungush]] || [[word:zazhuzhungu|zazhuzhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhunguth|zazhunguth]] || [[word:zazhunguj|zazhunguj]] || [[word:zazhungush|zazhungush]] || [[word:zazhungu|zazhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhufnguth|zazhufnguth]] || [[word:zazhufnguj|zazhufnguj]] || [[word:zazhufngush|zazhufngush]] || [[word:zazhufnguf|zazhufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazhunguthu|zazhunguthu]] || [[word:zazhunguju|zazhunguju]] || [[word:zazhungushu|zazhungushu]] || [[word:zazhunguku|zazhunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazhunguth|zazhunguth]] || [[word:zazhunguj|zazhunguj]] || [[word:zazhungush|zazhungush]] || [[word:zazhungu|zazhungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazhunguthul|zazhunguthul]] || [[word:zazhungujul|zazhungujul]] || [[word:zazhungushul|zazhungushul]] || [[word:zazhungukul|zazhungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazhunguthuthu|zazhunguthuthu]] || [[word:zazhungujuju|zazhungujuju]] || [[word:zazhungushushu|zazhungushushu]] || [[word:zazhunguku|zazhunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazhunguthun|zazhunguthun]] || [[word:zazhungujun|zazhungujun]] || [[word:zazhungushun|zazhungushun]] || [[word:zazhungukun|zazhungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazhunguthuoro|zazhunguthuoro]] || [[word:zazhungujuoro|zazhungujuoro]] || [[word:zazhungushuoro|zazhungushuoro]] || [[word:zazhungukuoro|zazhungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
